_meta.note: STARTER set — kernel-verified statements only (elaborates with ':= by sorry'). These are original goals curated for the prover plateau experiment. They are NOT imported from miniF2F or PutnamBench. Importing those full benchmarks is a follow-up task.
_meta.format: Each entry: {theorem_src, imports}. theorem_src is a Lean 4 statement header (no proof body). The prover A/B runner appends the proof body.

tiers.T0: Elementary — decide/ring/omega/simp-class. Pulled from the organic3_memory.db run ledger (modular-arithmetic conjecture mix).
tiers.T1: AMC/AIME-flavored — number theory, divisibility, inequalities; need several tactic steps but a single focused argument.
tiers.T2: Olympiad/Putnam-flavored — genuine multi-step reasoning, classical theorems; expect large prover models to outpace small ones here.

_meta.verification: All T1/T2 entries verified 2026-06-24 against leibniz-lean:v4.31.0 via LeanCliBackend.compile_statement (elaborates with 'by sorry'). Dropped: t2_fermat_little (p | n^p - n over Z had type mismatch; replaced with t2_zmod_fermat using ZMod).

T0.theorem_src: theorem t0_residue_mod6_even_not_four (n : ℕ) : (((n^2 + n)^2 + n^2 + n) % 6) % 2 = 0 ∧ ((n^2 + n)^2 + n^2 + n) % 6 ≠ 4

T1.theorem_src: theorem t1_sum_odd_sq_mod4 (a b : ℤ) (ha : Odd a) (hb : Odd b) : (a^2 + b^2) % 4 = 2
theorem t1_diff_sq_div8 (n : ℕ) (h : Odd n) : 8 ∣ n^2 - 1

T2.theorem_src: theorem t2_inf_primes : ∀ n : ℕ, ∃ p : ℕ, n < p ∧ p.Prime
theorem t2_cauchy_schwarz_nat (n : ℕ) (a b : Fin n → ℝ) : (∑ i, a i * b i)^2 ≤ (∑ i, a i ^ 2) * (∑ i, b i ^ 2)
theorem t2_bernoulli_ineq (x : ℝ) (hx : -1 ≤ x) (n : ℕ) : 1 + n * x ≤ (1 + x)^n
theorem t2_coprime_prod (a b c : ℕ) (h1 : Nat.Coprime a b) (h2 : Nat.Coprime a c) : Nat.Coprime a (b * c)
theorem t2_zmod_fermat (p : ℕ) [Fact (Nat.Prime p)] (x : ZMod p) : x^p = x
theorem t2_pigeonhole_mod (n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) (f : Fin (n + 1) → ZMod n) : ∃ i j : Fin (n + 1), i ≠ j ∧ f i = f j
